scan_rules.rule_1_evidence_json_strict_scan: Scan all evidence JSON files, check status field, check blocked_reason, check runtime_mode, record violations
scan_rules.rule_2_inspector_decision_ledger_scan: Scan Inspector and DecisionLedger JSON files, check snapshot data, check decision entry context
scan_rules.rule_3_provider_runtime_matrix_scan: Scan provider runtime matrix JSON, check provider runtime status, check blocked_reason, check evidence_file reference
scan_rules.rule_4_final_report_section_scan: Scan final report markdown, detect section by heading, check allowed section

violation_severity_levels.high: Forbidden terms in RUNTIME_PASS evidence status, provider runtime status RUNTIME_PASS, Inspector snapshots RUNTIME_PASS, DecisionLedger entries RUNTIME_PASS
violation_severity_levels.medium: Forbidden terms in CONTRACT_PASS evidence explanations, Inspector snapshots CONTRACT_PASS, DecisionLedger entries CONTRACT_PASS, provider runtime status CONTRACT_PASS
violation_severity_levels.low: Forbidden terms in blocked_reason fields (allowed), runtime_mode fields (allowed), evidence_file references (allowed), final report allowed sections

scan_output_format.violation_output: file_path, field_path, term, context, violation_type, severity, value
scan_output_format.report_output: scan_timestamp, total_files_scanned, total_violations, violations, term_counts, context_counts, compliance_status

gate_integration: PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader runs artifact redline scan
APRV-001: All Providers Runtime Verified Gate runs artifact redline scan

implementation_requirements.file_discovery: Recursively scan specified directories, filter by file patterns, skip binary files and build artifacts, handle JSON parsing errors
implementation_requirements.performance: Scan 100+ JSON files in < 5 seconds, memory usage < 50MB, parallel scanning, incremental scanning
